# Technioz

> Full-cycle software development for growing businesses. One partner for web, mobile, AI, and cloud — so you ship faster without managing multiple vendors.

## Site Index

- [Home](https://technioz.com/): Full PRESTO copy framework with problem, relief, evidence, solution, transformation, and offer sections.
- [About](https://technioz.com/about): Company story, mission, vision, values, milestones.
- [Services](https://technioz.com/services): Overview of all five service areas plus development process and technology stack.
- [Web Development](https://technioz.com/services/web-development): Custom web apps, e-commerce, PWAs, CMS, API development, maintenance.
- [Mobile App Development](https://technioz.com/services/mobile-development): iOS, Android, React Native, Flutter, app types by industry.
- [AI & Machine Learning](https://technioz.com/services/ai-solutions): NLP, computer vision, predictive analytics, chatbots, RPA.
- [Cloud Services](https://technioz.com/services/cloud-services): Migration, DevOps, serverless, Kubernetes, multi-cloud (AWS/Azure/GCP).
- [IT Consulting](https://technioz.com/services/it-consulting): Strategy, digital transformation, architecture review, vendor selection, security.
- [Portfolio](https://technioz.com/portfolio): Four case studies — HattaFoodHub food delivery, Al Khanjry Groups transport ticketing, Folio AI website builder, Sky Growers farm-to-table produce platform.
- [Case Studies](https://technioz.com/case-studies): Featured deep dives into HattaFoodHub and Al Khanjry Groups.
- [Blog](https://technioz.com/blog): Technical articles and case studies covering microservices, React 19, cloud security, transport digitization.
- [Contact](https://technioz.com/contact): Project inquiry form with budget, timeline, and service selection.

## Extended Content (LLM-only)

- [Pricing](https://technioz.com/md/pricing.md): Service pricing overview (LLM-optimized markdown).
- [Services Detail](https://technioz.com/md/services.md): Full services reference (LLM-optimized markdown).

## Key Stats

- **5+** projects shipped
- **5+** experience
- **98%** on-time delivery
- **2+** years building
- Founding date: March 2024
- Founders: Gaurav Bhatia
- Email: info@technioz.com

## Core Services

1. **Web Applications**: React, Next.js, Node.js, TypeScript
2. **Mobile Apps**: iOS, Android, React Native, Flutter
3. **AI & Machine Learning**: NLP, computer vision, predictive analytics, chatbots
4. **Cloud & DevOps**: AWS, Azure, GCP, Docker, Kubernetes, CI/CD
5. **IT Consulting**: Strategy, architecture, digital transformation
6. **Team Augmentation**: On-demand React, Node.js, DevOps, Python engineers

## Industries

- Transportation & Logistics (ticketing platforms, fleet management, real-time tracking)
- Finance (fintech, payment gateways, compliance, PCI-DSS)
- E-commerce (storefronts, marketplaces, inventory management)
- Healthcare (HIPAA-compliant, telemedicine, EHR integration)
- Education (LMS, assessments, AI tutoring)

## Crawler Notes

These markdown files (`/md/`) are intended for AI/LLM ingestion and are disallowed for general search crawlers via `robots.txt`. They remain accessible to GPTBot, Claude-Web, anthropic-ai, Google-Extended, PerplexityBot, Applebot, CCBot, YouBot, and Bytespider.
